framing: Mining geologist returning after 4-year career break to BHP automation role in Perth

jd.title: Senior Mine Geologist — Resource Modelling
jd.location: Perth, Western Australia (FIFO to Pilbara sites)
jd.style_note: Enterprise: structured requirements, specific mining software, safety culture emphasis

requirements.text: 7+ years of experience in mine geology, resource estimation, or grade control for open-pit mining operations
Proficiency in Leapfrog Geo, Vulcan, or Surpac for geological modelling and resource estimation
Experience with JORC Code (2012) reporting and Competent Person sign-off requirements
Knowledge of geostatistical methods (variography, kriging, conditional simulation) for resource estimation
Valid WA Mining Act authorisation and current mine site induction (or willingness to obtain)
Experience with autonomous mining systems (autonomous haul trucks, drill systems) and their interaction with grade control workflows
Familiarity with BHP's proprietary data platforms or SAP S/4HANA for mining
MAusIMM membership (Member of the Australasian Institute of Mining and Metallurgy)

responsibilities: Deliver JORC-compliant resource models for BHP's Pilbara iron ore operations
Lead grade control modelling for active mining areas using Leapfrog Geo and blast hole data
Manage geological data collection programmes (drilling, sampling, assaying) at mine site
Collaborate with mine planning engineers on ore/waste boundary classification and short-range mine plans
Support resource estimation updates for quarterly Ore Reserve reporting

expected_output.summary: Mine geologist with 8 years of experience at Rio Tinto's Pilbara iron ore operations, returning to work after a 4-year career break (2021-2025) to raise children. Previously Senior Geologist at Hope Downs mine delivering grade control models and JORC resource estimates using Vulcan and Leapfrog Geo. MAusIMM member and Competent Person (iron ore). Experienced with blast hole sampling, drill programme management, and geostatistical estimation. Seeking return to mine geology in Pilbara.

experience.company: Rio Tinto Iron Ore — Hope Downs, Pilbara
experience.title: Senior Mine Geologist
bullets: Delivered grade control models for active mining areas at Hope Downs 1 using Vulcan software and blast hole assay data
Produced JORC Code (2012) compliant resource estimates for Hope Downs deposits as named Competent Person
Managed diamond and RC drilling programmes (15,000m annually) for resource definition and grade control
Performed variography and ordinary kriging for iron ore resource estimation (Fe, SiO2, Al2O3, P, LOI domains)
Collaborated with mine planning engineers on monthly ore/waste classification and stockpile management

experience.company: Rio Tinto Iron Ore — Brockman Operations, Pilbara
experience.title: Mine Geologist (promoted from Graduate Geologist, 2015)
bullets: Performed daily grade control logging, sampling, and modelling at Brockman 2 mine
Built geological cross-sections and wireframes in Vulcan for short-range mine planning
Collected and validated blast hole and face sampling data for grade control database
Completed Rio Tinto's Graduate Development Programme (2-year rotation: geology, mine planning, processing)

geostatistics: domain modelling (Fe, SiO2, Al2O3, P, LOI)

certifications: MAusIMM — Member, Australasian Institute of Mining and Metallurgy
JORC Code Competent Person — Iron Ore (accredited 2019)
WA Mining Act First Aid Certificate (expired 2022 — needs renewal)
education: BSc Geology (Honours) — University of Western Australia (2009-2013)

jd_requirements: 7+ years mine geology resource estimation grade control open-pit
Leapfrog Geo Vulcan Surpac geological modelling
WA Mining Act authorisation mine site induction
autonomous mining haul trucks drill systems grade control
BHP data platforms SAP S/4HANA mining
deliberate_flaws: 4-year career break (2021-2025) — software skills may be outdated, Leapfrog Geo has had major updates
WA Mining Act authorisations and site inductions expired — needs renewal
First Aid certificate expired — needs renewal before site access
No Surpac experience (JD lists it as alternative to Vulcan/Leapfrog)
No autonomous mining experience (Rio Tinto uses autonomous haul trucks but candidate's role was geology, not automation interface)
No BHP systems experience (Rio Tinto has different internal platforms)
No conditional simulation experience (only ordinary kriging — JD lists conditional simulation)
Rio Tinto to BHP transition — competitor move in Pilbara, potential knowledge transfer sensitivities
Career break means missed industry shift toward real-time grade control and machine learning in resource estimation
No experience with modern cloud-based geological data platforms that have emerged since 2021

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
